node.text:
🕉️ नवरात्रि की हार्दिक शुभकामनाएँ 🕉️

The central story behind Navaratri revolves around Goddess Durga’s epic battle against Mahishasura, a demon who was granted near invincibility by Lord Brahma. Unable to be defeated by any man or god, Mahishasura terrorized both heaven and earth until the gods collectively manifested Durga, who fought him for nine nights and ultimately vanquished him on the tenth day, which is celebrated as Vijayadashami

[navratri, navaratri, durga puja, goddess durga, garba, dandiya, navratri festival, navratri 2025, navratri colours, navratri celebration, navratri outfits, navratri thali, navratri recipes, navratri quotes, navratri wishes, navratri decoration, navratri events, navratri offers, navratri sale, navratri special, navratri dance, navratri fasting, navratri shopping, traditional wear, indian festival, festive deal]

node.text:
Ganesh Chaturthi is almost here 🔱

✨🔱🕉️🔱 **Ganesh Chaturthi** is a festival that celebrates the birth of **Lord Ganesha**, the remover of obstacles and the god of wisdom, prosperity, and good fortune. People bring beautifully crafted idols of Lord Ganesha into their homes and communities, offering prayers, sweets (especially modaks ), and devotion. 

This festival is not just about rituals—it’s about **new beginnings, unity, and positivity**. The celebration reminds us to let go of negativity, embrace wisdom, and welcome peace into our lives. As we immerse the idol in water, it symbolizes the **cycle of creation and dissolution**, teaching us the art of detachment and mindfulness. 

May Lord Ganesha bless everyone with happiness, success, and harmony. 🌸🙏 

#GaneshChaturthi #GanpatiBappaMorya #FestivalsOfIndia #DivineBlessings #NewBeginnings #CulturalHeritage #WisdomAndProsperity #SpiritualCelebration  #fyp #explore

node.text:
❤️🩵🧡💙🕉️ कृष्ण जन्माष्टमी 🕉️💙🧡🩵❤️
Krishna Ki Chetawani – A divine warning that changed the fate of Mahabharata!
Before the Kurukshetra war, Lord Krishna went to Hastinapur as a peace messenger, offering the Kauravas one last chance to avoid destruction. But when arrogance and greed blinded them, Krishna’s words became a prophetic warning — a message that still echoes through time: “Adharma will never win over Dharma.”

This video takes you into that powerful moment — Krishna’s calm yet fierce words, the truth about righteousness, and the inevitable destiny of those who choose the path of injustice.

✨ Witness the timeless wisdom of Lord Krishna – a message not just for the warriors of the past, but for every generation.

📌 Watch till the end to feel the intensity of Krishna’s resolve and the moral lessons hidden in his chetawani.

#KrishnaKiChetawani #Mahabharata #BhagavadGita #LordKrishna #SanatanDharma #Kurukshetra #Hinduism #Dharma

#

node.text:
​Gandhari: "You call yourself a friend? You call yourself a God? If you are a God, then why is there so much blood on your hands?"
​Krishna: "Mother, the fruit of the tree depends on the seed that was sown. I only allowed the Law of Karma to take its course."
​Gandhari: This is when she delivers the curse. She says that since Krishna allowed her lineage to be wiped out through internal conflict and "chhal" (deceit), his own clan—the Yaduvanshis—will also slaughter each other.

#krishna #sanatandharma #navratri2025 #gita #bhagavadgita

node.text:
गंगा की धार-सा शीतल, काल की आग-सा प्रचंड,
वो शिव है—अकेला, अधूरा, पर फिर भी अखंड।"
​मेरे भीतर का कोलाहल जिस दिन थमेगा,
उस दिन केवल महादेव का डमरू बजेगा l

महाशिवरात्रि की शुभकामनाएं!

#mahadev #bhakti #shiva #indianculture #shivratri
